About Bar Ready LV

Protecting Las Vegas Bars, One Inspection at a Time

WHAT WE DO

Professional Mock Health and Safety Inspections for Las Vegas

Bar Ready LV performs Mock Health and Safety Inspections for bars and restaurants in Las Vegas, Nevada — helping establishments identify and correct compliance issues before a real inspector does.

We don't just perform the Mock Health and Safety Inspection — we deliver peace of mind. Our mission is to make Mock Health and Safety Inspections a required standard for every bar in the United States.

Book an Inspection
🛡️

Our Mission

To make Mock Health and Safety Inspections a required standard for every bar in the United States.

$350 per month — peace of mind that pays for itself
"
Closures and fines can devastate a bar or restaurant. A bad health rating doesn't just attract penalties — it drives customers away and damages reputation. Bar Ready LV gives owners peace of mind and protects their business from preventable loss.

Every year, bars and restaurants across Las Vegas face unexpected inspections that result in temporary closures, steep fines, and lasting damage to their reputation. The worst part? Most of these issues are entirely preventable. That's exactly why Bar Ready LV exists — to get ahead of the problem before a real inspector does.

Who We Serve

From single-location bar owners to large-scale hospitality groups, we protect every level of the Las Vegas hospitality industry.

🏢

Restaurant Investment Firms

Large-scale firms managing multiple F&B assets need consistent compliance standards across every location. We protect your portfolio.

🎰

Casinos

Casino properties operating high-volume bars and restaurants face constant scrutiny. We help maintain standards that match your brand.

🏨

Hospitality Groups

Multi-venue hospitality operators need uniform compliance across their entire portfolio. We deliver that consistency.

🍺

Individual Bar Owners

Solo bar owners in Las Vegas deserve the same level of protection as the big players. We're here for you too.

Our inspection specialists bring expertise, professionalism, and genuine care to every visit.
